meaning: n.(阿尔冈昆印地安人崇拜的)大神,神灵,超自然力,具有超自然力的事物
examples: Manito wants to know who would win a fight between Tyson and Ali.
The wind of the manito blowed again and the several large or small lands floating in the sea appeared.
When the origin sound of all the glorification or execrative issued from the manito, Bodhisattva felt heavy shock.
